ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-04-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) HEADTHERE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, AND DAN SANDBERG AS TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE OCT-24-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-28-2011 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROY SANDBERG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED IN ITS ENTIRETY. DEFENDANT'S CONTENTION THAT CASE SHOULD BE ARBITRATED NEEDS TO BE RAISED BY A MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. DEFENDANT CAN REASONABLY RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT AND THE ECONOMIC LITIGATION RULES BAR SPECIAL DEMURRERS IN A LIMITED JURISDICTION CASE. JUDGE KAHN DISCLOSES THAT HE WAS EMPLOYED BY HELLER EHRMAN AS AN ASSOCIATE FROM 1983 TO 1987, BUT DOES NOT BELIEVE THAT HIS PAST ASSOCIATION WITH HELLER EHRMAN AFFECTS HIS ABILITY TO FAIR AND IMPARTIAL IN THIS CASE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SONIA WONG, CSR #11288
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-01-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL C. STARKEY OF ADLER LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 433-5333 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF HELLER EHRMAN LLP'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Curtis Karnow; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/CK

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-11-2012 Continued To Aug-22-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2012 Continued To May-25-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2012 Continued To Mar-23-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael C. Starkey Esq., from Adler Law Firm, 415-433-5333, for plaintiff and opposing party

No other appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT ROY SANDBERG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled in its entirety. Defendant's contention that case should be arbitrated needs to be raised by a motion to compel arbitration. Defendant can reasonably respond to the complaint and the economic litigation rules bar special demurrers in a limited jurisdiction case. Judge Kahn discloses that he was employed by Heller Ehrman as an associate from 1983 to 1987, but does not believe that his past association with Heller Ehrman affects his ability to fair and impartial in this case.
Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288
